message:
Rewrite ruos-agent in pure Rust — zero Python dependency

Full Rust rewrite of the agentic daemon with 7 modules:
- aidefence: 28 injection + 5 PII + 4 action patterns (compiled regex)
- monitor: service health checks + GPU thermal + auto-restart
- profile: auto-switch with LLM reasoning + RAG + rule fallback
- backfill: embed unvectorized memories via SQLite + HTTP
- eval: self-evaluation with drift detection
- ota: GitHub release check + download + dpkg install
- llm: HTTP client to ruvllm serve (candle inline planned)

8.4 MB static binary, 6/6 security tests pass, <2s heartbeat.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+[package]
+name = "ruos-agent"
+version = "1.1.0"
+edition = "2021"
+rust-version = "1.77"
+license = "MIT"
+description = "ruOS agentic daemon — observe, reason, act. Self-monitoring, auto-profile, AIDefence, OTA."
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "ruos-agent"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[dependencies]
+# HTTP + async
+reqwest = { version = "0.12", features = ["json", "native-tls"], default-features = false }
+tokio = { version = "1", features = ["rt-multi-thread", "macros", "time", "process", "fs"] }
+
+# Serialization
+serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json = "1"
+
+# CLI
+clap = { version = "4", features = ["derive"] }
+
+# AIDefence patterns
+regex = "1"
+
+# SQLite for direct brain access
+rusqlite = { version = "0.32", features = ["bundled"] }
+
+# Time
+chrono = "0.4"
+
+# Misc
+anyhow = "1"
+hex = "0.4"
+dirs = "5"

+//! LLM module — placeholder for future candle-based local inference.
+//! Currently the agent calls the external ruos-llm-serve via HTTP.
+//! This module will eventually replace it with inline candle inference.
+
+// The LLM reasoning logic is in profile.rs (llm_reason function)
+// which calls the HTTP endpoint. When we port the LLM to inline candle,
+// this module will own the model loading and inference.
